verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm trading my sorrows, I'm trading my shame, I'm laying them down for the joy of the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm trading my sickness, I'm trading my pain, I'm laying them down for the joy of the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We say, yes Lord, yes Lord, yes, yes Lord Yes Lord, yes Lord, yes, yes Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yes Lord, yes Lord, yes, yes Lord Amen

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm pressed, but not crushed, persecuted, not abandoned, Struck down, but not destroyed,

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I'm blessed beyond the curse For his promise will endure, That his joy's gonna be my strength

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Though the sorrow may last for the night His joy come with the morning
